rows.Key Lesson: Parametric hurricane triggers can be operationally linked to authoritative best-track data
rows.Explanation: Jamaica triggers rely on storm track and minimum central pressure from NHC systems
rows.Relevance for Sovereign Finance: Improves transparency of payout and supports fiscal planning
rows.Possible Relevance for Israel: Inference based on source: Israel could apply similar “authoritative data source” discipline for relevant hazards

rows.Key Lesson: Multi-year coverage aligns disaster liquidity with budget cycles
